name: Financial Statement Upload Webhook - Metrics Flattened to Google Sheets

parameters.jsCode:
return [{
  json: {
    received_at: $json.receivedAt || '',
    company_name: $json.company_name || '',
    quarter: $json.quarter || '',
    industry: $json.industry || '',
    ok: String($json.ok ?? ''),
    ingest_status: $json.ingest_status || '',
    message: $json.message || '',
    original_field_name: $json.original_field_name || '',
    file_name: $json.file_name || '',
    mime_type: $json.mime_type || '',
    file_extension: $json.file_extension || '',
    file_size: String($json.file_size ?? ''),
    pdf_sha256: $json.pdf_sha256 || '',
    pdf_size_bytes: String($json.pdf_size_bytes ?? ''),
    pdf_page_count: String($json.pdf_page_count ?? ''),
    pdf_word_count_sampled: String($json.pdf_word_count_sampled ?? ''),
    metrics_ingested_at: $json.metrics_ingested_at || '',
    metrics_pdf_signature_ok: String($json.metrics_pdf_signature_ok ?? ''),
    metrics_chars: String($json.metrics_chars ?? ''),
    metrics_nonempty_line_count: String($json.metrics_nonempty_line_count ?? ''),
    metrics_number_token_count: String($json.metrics_number_token_count ?? ''),
    metrics_email_count: String($json.metrics_email_count ?? ''),
    metrics_url_count: String($json.metrics_url_count ?? ''),
    metrics_currency_mention_count: String($json.metrics_currency_mention_count ?? ''),
    metrics_image_count_in_sampled_pages: String($json.metrics_image_count_in_sampled_pages ?? ''),
    metrics_sampled_page_count: String($json.metrics_sampled_page_count ?? ''),
    metrics_preview_text: $json.metrics_preview_text || '',
    metrics_metadata_json: $json.metrics_metadata_json || '',
    pdf_metrics_json: $json.pdf_metrics_json || '',

    financial_currency: $json.financial_currency || '',
    financial_units_label: $json.financial_units_label || '',
    financial_found_items_count: String($json.financial_found_items_count ?? ''),
    financial_has_income_statement: String($json.financial_has_income_statement ?? ''),
    financial_has_balance_sheet: String($json.financial_has_balance_sheet ?? ''),

    income_total_operating_income: String($json.income_total_operating_income ?? ''),
    income_profit_for_period: String($json.income_profit_for_period ?? ''),
    bs_total_assets: String($json.bs_total_assets ?? ''),

    ratio_roa: String($json.ratio_roa ?? ''),
    ratio_roa_pct: String($json.ratio_roa_pct ?? ''),
    ratio_roe: String($json.ratio_roe ?? ''),
    ratio_roe_pct: String($json.ratio_roe_pct ?? ''),
    ratio_cost_to_income: String($json.ratio_cost_to_income ?? ''),
    ratio_cost_to_income_pct: String($json.ratio_cost_to_income_pct ?? ''),
    ratio_npl_ratio: String($json.ratio_npl_ratio ?? ''),
    ratio_npl_ratio_pct: String($json.ratio_npl_ratio_pct ?? ''),
    ratio_coverage_ratio: String($json.ratio_coverage_ratio ?? ''),
    ratio_coverage_ratio_pct: String($json.ratio_coverage_ratio_pct ?? ''),
    ratio_loan_to_deposit: String($json.ratio_loan_to_deposit ?? ''),
    ratio_loan_to_deposit_pct: String($json.ratio_loan_to_deposit_pct ?? ''),

    financial_details_json: $json.financial_details_json || ''
  }
}];

const src = $('Inspect Upload + Parse Metrics').first().json;
return [{
  json: {
    ok: true,
    message: 'PDF received successfully in n8n and logged to Google Sheets.',
    receivedAt: src.receivedAt,
    company_name: src.company_name,
    quarter: src.quarter,
    industry: src.industry,
    original_field_name: src.original_field_name,
    file_name: src.file_name,
    mime_type: src.mime_type,
    file_extension: src.file_extension,
    file_size: src.file_size,
    pdf_sha256: src.pdf_sha256,
    pdf_size_bytes: src.pdf_size_bytes,
    pdf_page_count: src.pdf_page_count,
    pdf_word_count_sampled: src.pdf_word_count_sampled,
    metrics_chars: src.metrics_chars,
    metrics_image_count_in_sampled_pages: src.metrics_image_count_in_sampled_pages,
    metrics_sampled_page_count: src.metrics_sampled_page_count,

    income_total_operating_income: src.income_total_operating_income,
    income_profit_for_period: src.income_profit_for_period,
    bs_total_assets: src.bs_total_assets,
    ratio_roa: src.ratio_roa,
    ratio_roa_pct: src.ratio_roa_pct,
    ratio_roe: src.ratio_roe,
    ratio_roe_pct: src.ratio_roe_pct,

    sheet_update: 'success'
  }
}];
